lines.english: How was the drunk removed from the ring?
lines.chinese: 醉汉是怎样被弄出斗牛场的？
lines.raw: How was the drunk removed from the ring? | 醉汉是怎样被弄出斗牛场的？

lines.english: During a bullfight, a drunk suddenly wandered into the middle of the ring.
lines.chinese: 在一场斗牛中，一个醉汉突然晃晃悠悠地走进斗牛场中央。
lines.raw: During a bullfight, a drunk suddenly wandered into the middle of the ring. | 在一场斗牛中，一个醉汉突然晃晃悠悠地走进斗牛场中央。

lines.english: The crowd began to shout, but the drunk was unaware of the danger.
lines.chinese: 观众开始大叫，但醉汉全然不知危险。
lines.raw: The crowd began to shout, but the drunk was unaware of the danger. | 观众开始大叫，但醉汉全然不知危险。

lines.english: The bull was busy with the matador at the time,
lines.chinese: 那时，公牛正忙着对付斗牛士，
lines.raw: The bull was busy with the matador at the time, | 那时，公牛正忙着对付斗牛士，

lines.english: but it suddenly caught sight of the drunk who was shouting rude remarks and waving a red cap.
lines.chinese: 但它突然发现那个醉汉正在大声说粗话，挥舞着一顶红帽子。
lines.raw: but it suddenly caught sight of the drunk who was shouting rude remarks and waving a red cap. | 但它突然发现那个醉汉正在大声说粗话，挥舞着一顶红帽子。

lines.chinese: 显然，公牛对批评很敏感，
lines.raw: Apparently sensitive to criticism, | 显然，公牛对批评很敏感，

lines.english: the bull forgot all about the matador and charged at the drunk.
lines.chinese: 它把斗牛士忘得一干二净，径直向醉汉冲去。
lines.raw: the bull forgot all about the matador and charged at the drunk. | 它把斗牛士忘得一干二净，径直向醉汉冲去。
The crowd suddenly grew quiet. | 观众突然鸦雀无声。

lines.english: The drunk, however, seemed quite sure of himself.
lines.chinese: 然而，那醉汉好像十分自信。
lines.raw: The drunk, however, seemed quite sure of himself. | 然而，那醉汉好像十分自信。

lines.english: When the bull got close to him, he clumsily stepped aside to let it pass.
lines.chinese: 当公牛冲到他身边时，他笨拙地闪到一边，让公牛过去。
lines.raw: When the bull got close to him, he clumsily stepped aside to let it pass. | 当公牛冲到他身边时，他笨拙地闪到一边，让公牛过去。

lines.english: The crowd broke into cheers and the drunk bowed.
lines.chinese: 观众爆发出阵阵喝彩声，醉汉则鞠躬致意。
lines.raw: The crowd broke into cheers and the drunk bowed. | 观众爆发出阵阵喝彩声，醉汉则鞠躬致意。

lines.english: By this time, however three men had come into the ring and they quickly dragged the drunk to safety.
lines.chinese: 就在这时，3个人走进斗牛场，他们迅速把醉汉拖到安全地带。
lines.raw: By this time, however three men had come into the ring and they quickly dragged the drunk to safety. | 就在这时，3个人走进斗牛场，他们迅速把醉汉拖到安全地带。

lines.english: Even the bull seemed to feel sorry for him,
lines.chinese: 好像连公牛都为他感到惋惜，
lines.raw: Even the bull seemed to feel sorry for him, | 好像连公牛都为他感到惋惜，

lines.english: for it looked on sympathetically until the drunk was out of the way before once more turning its attention to the matador.
lines.chinese: 它一直同情地看着，直到醉汉离开场地才再次把注意力转向斗牛士。
lines.raw: for it looked on sympathetically until the drunk was out of the way before once more turning its attention to the matador. | 它一直同情地看着，直到醉汉离开场地才再次把注意力转向斗牛士。
